use_cases: Landing page hero sections with scroll-driven visual storytelling
Product showcases with animated image reveals on scroll
Creative portfolio or agency landing pages with parallax effects
Interactive storytelling sections in marketing sites
App feature introductions with cinematic scroll animations
ai_summary: A scroll-driven hero section component featuring a plane animation that flies across the screen as users scroll. Uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks for parallax-like effects with dynamic opacity transitions. The component wraps content in a sticky container within a tall scroll container, creating an immersive visual narrative perfect for creative landing pages and product showcases.
